claim: Total revenue grew 22% YoY to 109896
audit_note: Use as evidence that the company is still growing during the AI interface shift.

claim: Google Search and other revenue grew 19% YoY to 60399
audit_note: Validates no near-term Search revenue collapse; does not prove AI Search RPM.

claim: YouTube ads revenue grew 11% YoY to 9883
audit_note: Useful secondary owned-surface ad growth evidence.

claim: Google Network revenue declined YoY to 6971
audit_note: Evidence that open-web ad surfaces are weaker than owned surfaces.

claim: Google Cloud revenue grew 63% YoY to 20028
audit_note: Strong growth evidence; must pair with margin and capex.

claim: Google Cloud operating income was 6598
audit_note: Supports Cloud quality, but single-quarter margin sustainability remains open.

claim: Google Cloud operating margin was about 32.9%
audit_note: Derived from Cloud operating income divided by Cloud revenue.

claim: Operating cash flow was 45790
audit_note: OCF still strong in absolute terms.

claim: Purchases of property and equipment were 35674
audit_note: Central capex pressure evidence.

claim: Free cash flow was 10116
audit_note: OCF minus capex; confirms FCF compression despite strong revenue.

claim: Repurchases of Class A and C shares were zero in Q1 2026
audit_note: Buyback pause makes SBC/dilution more important.

claim: Debt proceeds net of costs were 31379
audit_note: Shows financing regime change alongside capex.

claim: Capex consumed about 77.9% of operating cash flow
audit_note: Derived from Q1 OCF and capex.

claim: Assets not yet in service rose to 108597
audit_note: Important for future depreciation and utilization timing.

claim: Paid clicks grew 13% and CPC grew 5% for Search and other
audit_note: Supports Search auction health; not a direct AI cohort metric.

claim: TAC to Google advertising revenue declined from 20.55% to 19.71%
audit_note: Owned-surface mix supports distribution quality.

claim: Management says AI Overviews and AI Mode are increasing Search usage and commercial queries
audit_note: Management claim; useful but not independent proof.

claim: Management says AI can improve monetization of longer and more complex searches
audit_note: No RPM cohort disclosure; keep as mechanism, not proven fact.

claim: Management says more than 30% of Search spend uses AI-enabled campaigns
audit_note: Ad-tool adoption supports auction migration but not ROI proof.

claim: Management says Cloud revenue would have been higher with more compute capacity
audit_note: Supports compute bottleneck thesis; needs utilization economics.

claim: Management references ROIC frameworks for capex but gives no numeric hurdle rate
audit_note: This is evidence of partial discipline and a remaining evidence gap.

claim: Management says just over half of Cloud backlog should convert within 24 months
audit_note: Timing evidence; backlog margin remains open.

claim: Management says Cloud margin faces depreciation headwind from higher capex
audit_note: Supports caution against extrapolating Q1 Cloud margin.

claim: 2026 capex guidance midpoint is 185000 from a 180000-190000 range
audit_note: Forward guidance; core input for owner earnings stress test.

claim: 2027 capex is expected to significantly increase versus 2026
audit_note: Directionally important; exact amount is undisclosed.

claim: Expected equity raise totals 80000000000
audit_note: Use to model dilution and capital allocation regime.

claim: Berkshire private placement gross proceeds were 10000000000
audit_note: External validation but not a substitute for underwriting.

claim: Berkshire reported Alphabet A and C holdings in Q1 2026 13F
audit_note: Quarter-end snapshot; not personal Buffett evidence.

claim: H&H reported 3706000 Alphabet Class C shares in Q1 2026 13F
audit_note: H&H is associated with Duan Yongping but not equivalent to personal real-time trading.

claim: H&H Class C share count approximately doubled from Q4 2025 to Q1 2026
audit_note: Derived from Q4 and Q1 13F snapshots.

claim: AI Overviews / AI Mode RPM versus traditional Search RPM is not disclosed
audit_note: This blocks a buy decision because it determines AI Search economics.

claim: Maintenance versus growth capex split is not disclosed
audit_note: This blocks normalized owner earnings.

claim: Cloud backlog margin by workload type is not disclosed
audit_note: This prevents full profit-pool quality judgment.

claim: Numeric AI capex hurdle rate or payback period is not disclosed
audit_note: This blocks full capital allocation underwriting.
